communities.could_not_fetch_host: Could not fetch the community's host. Ensure the repository exists and has a configured Fossim host.
communities.no_url_provided: Please provide the repository URL of a Fossim community.
confirm_host_view.explanation.1: This server hosts the community you're joining. You can be part of Fossim communities from different hosts at the same time - joining this community won't stop you from joining communities from other hosts.
confirm_host_view.explanation.2: You'll interact with discussions through this host's integration and connect to this host to receive live notifications.
confirm_host_view.explanation.3: This host's integration will only be able to act on your behalf in repositories where the owner has also installed the integration.
confirm_host_view.explanation.4: As this is a local application, your access token will not be shared with this host.
join_community_view.already_joined: You are already a member of this community.
join_community_view.title: Join community
oauth_view.could_not_complete_oauth: Could not complete the authorisation flow: {{error}}
oauth_view.could_not_contact_host: Could not contact the community's host: {{error}}
oauth_view.could_not_start_oauth: Could not start the authorisation flow: {{error}}
oauth_view.enter_code: Enter the code below at the URL below to log in.
onboarding_view.join_community: Join your first community using its repository URL:
